name: Mathematics
description: Master CSEC Mathematics with interactive lessons on Algebra, Geometry, Trigonometry, and more.

name: English A
description: Excel in CSEC English A with comprehension, summary writing, and grammar mastery.

name: Biology
description: Explore the living world through cells, nutrition, ecology, and genetics.

name: Chemistry
description: Explore the world of matter, atoms, and chemical reactions with interactive labs.

name: Physics
description: Understand the laws of the universe, from motion and forces to energy and waves.

name: Principles of Accounts
description: Master the fundamentals of accounting, from bookkeeping to financial statements.

name: Information Technology
description: Master CSEC Information Technology, from hardware fundamentals to programming and spreadsheets.

name: Social Studies
description: Understand the world around you: families, government, regional integration, and social issues in the Caribbean.

name: Human & Social Biology
description: Understand the human body, health, and how our practices affect the environment.
